channel.title: The Document Index
channel.description: The living index of document-AI tooling — OCR, PDF extraction, document parsing, layout, tables and VLM understanding.

item.title: PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR — momentum 87
item.description: Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

item.title: opendatalab/MinerU — momentum 86
item.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.

item.title: docling-project/docling — momentum 86
item.description: Get your documents ready for gen AI

item.title: tesseract-ocr/tesseract — momentum 85
item.description: Tesseract Open Source OCR Engine (main repository)

item.title: datalab-to/marker — momentum 82
item.description: Convert PDF to markdown + JSON quickly with high accuracy

item.title: ocrmypdf/OCRmyPDF — momentum 82
item.description: OCRmyPDF adds an OCR text layer to scanned PDF files, allowing them to be searched

item.title: opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf — momentum 81
item.description: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.

item.title: datalab-to/surya — momentum 80
item.description: OCR, layout analysis, reading order, table recognition in 90+ languages

item.title: naptha/tesseract.js — momentum 79
item.description: Pure Javascript OCR for more than 100 Languages 📖🎉🖥

item.title: Unstructured-IO/unstructured — momentum 79
item.description: Convert documents to structured data effortlessly. Unstructured is open-source ETL solution for transforming complex documents into clean, structured formats for language models. Visit our website to learn more about our enterprise grade Platform product for production grade workflows, partitioning

item.title: pymupdf/PyMuPDF — momentum 77
item.description: PyMuPDF is a high performance Python library for data extraction, analysis, conversion & manipulation of PDF (and other) documents.

item.title: run-llama/liteparse — momentum 77
item.description: A fast, helpful, and open-source document parser

item.title: RapidAI/RapidOCR — momentum 75
item.description: 📄 Awesome OCR multiple programing languages toolkits based on ONNX Runtime, OpenVINO, MNN, PaddlePaddle, TensorRT and PyTorch.

item.title: Zipstack/unstract — momentum 75
item.description: LLM-Driven Extraction of Unstructured Data — Built for API Deployments & ETL Pipeline Workflows

item.title: PaddlePaddle/PaddleX — momentum 74
item.description: All-in-One Development Tool based on PaddlePaddle

item.title: mindee/doctr — momentum 74
item.description: docTR (Document Text Recognition) - a seamless, high-performing & accessible library for OCR-related tasks powered by Deep Learning.

item.title: DayBreak-u/chineseocr_lite — momentum 73
item.description: 超轻量级中文ocr，支持竖排文字识别, 支持ncnn、mnn、tnn推理 ( dbnet(1.8M) + crnn(2.5M) + anglenet(378KB)) 总模型仅4.7M

item.title: shipfastlabs/parsel — momentum 71
item.description: A fast, helpful, and open-source document parser for PHP

item.title: UglyToad/PdfPig — momentum 70
item.description: Read and extract text and other content from PDFs in C# (port of PDFBox)

item.title: Yuliang-Liu/MonkeyOCR — momentum 69
item.description: A lightweight LMM-based Document Parsing Model

item.title: datalab-to/chandra — momentum 68
item.description: OCR model that handles complex tables, forms, handwriting with full layout.

item.title: run-llama/llama_cloud_services — momentum 68
item.description: Knowledge Agents and Management in the Cloud

item.title: shcherbak-ai/contextgem — momentum 68
item.description: ContextGem: Effortless LLM extraction from documents

item.title: jingsongliujing/OnnxOCR — momentum 68
item.description: 基于PaddleOCR重构，并且脱离PaddlePaddle深度学习训练框架的轻量级OCR，推理速度超快 —— A lightweight OCR system based on PaddleOCR, decoupled from the PaddlePaddle deep learning training framework, with ultra-fast inference speed.

item.title: kotaro-kinoshita/yomitoku — momentum 67
item.description: YomiTokuはAIを活用した日本語文書解析エンジンを提供するPythonパッケージです。 Yomitoku is an AI-powered document image analysis package designed specifically for the Japanese language.

item.title: zai-org/GLM-OCR — momentum 66
item.description: GLM-OCR: Accurate × Fast × Comprehensive

item.title: deepdoctection/deepdoctection — momentum 66
item.description: A Repo For Document AI

item.title: firecrawl/pdf-inspector — momentum 66
item.description: Fast Rust library for PDF inspection, classification, and text extraction. Intelligently detects scanned vs text-based PDFs to enable smart routing decisions.

item.title: YaoFANGUK/video-subtitle-extractor — momentum 65
item.description: 视频硬字幕提取，生成srt文件。无需申请第三方API，本地实现文本识别。基于深度学习的视频字幕提取框架，包含字幕区域检测、字幕内容提取。A GUI tool for extracting hard-coded subtitle (hardsub) from videos and generating srt files.

item.title: mittagessen/kraken — momentum 65
item.description: OCR engine for all the languages
